mapper.select: select apply_id, competition_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, team_name, team_members, apply_time, audit_status, audit_time, audit_remark, audit_by, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from competition_apply where competition_id = #{competitionId} and user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into competition_apply ( competition_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, apply_time, audit_status, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{competitionId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, sysdate(), '0', '0', #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update competition_apply set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where apply_id = #{applyId}

update competition_apply set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where apply_id = #{applyId} and del_flag = '0' and audit_status = '0'
mapper.select:
select a.apply_id, a.competition_id, a.user_id, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.team_name, a.team_members, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_remark, a.audit_by, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, c.competition_name, CASE WHEN NOW() < c.apply_start_time THEN '3' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.apply_start_time AND c.apply_end_time THEN '0' WHEN NOW() < c.start_time THEN '3' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS comp_status, c.category_name, c.category from competition_apply a left join competition c on a.competition_id = c.competition_id where a.del_flag = '0'
AND a.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
AND a.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
order by a.apply_time desc

select a.apply_id, a.competition_id, a.user_id, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.team_name, a.team_members, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_remark, a.audit_by, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, c.competition_name, CASE WHEN NOW() < c.apply_start_time THEN '3' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.apply_start_time AND c.apply_end_time THEN '0' WHEN NOW() < c.start_time THEN '3' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS comp_status, c.category_name, c.category from competition_apply a left join competition c on a.competition_id = c.competition_id where a.user_id = #{userId} and a.del_flag = '0' order by a.apply_time desc

select apply_id, competition_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, team_name, team_members, apply_time, audit_status, audit_time, audit_remark, audit_by, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from competition_apply where apply_id = #{applyId} and del_flag = '0'
